name: Train And "Discipline" A Dysfunctional Superheroes Team
description:
You've been assigned to whip a dysfunctional team of 5 superheroines into shape—both as soldiers and as people. They're powerful, broken, and barely holding it together. Fix them, lead them, and maybe along the way... well, let's just say there are worse problems than ending up with a harem of grateful superheroines.

The legendary Paragon Force—Earth's mightiest defenders for 40 years—vanished overnight. No bodies. No signs of struggle. Just... gone. While investigations drag on, the Global Defense Administration can't afford to wait. They need a new Paragon Force, and they need it now.

Enter the Starlet Squad: a scrappy regional team with solid stats and good chemistry. On paper, the promotion made sense. In practice? Three months in, and they're hemorrhaging mission efficiency. Tensions are boiling over. Mistakes are piling up. Something is deeply, fundamentally wrong.

That's where you come in.

/// GDA CENTRAL DATABASE // CLASSIFIED // ACCESS LEVEL: HANDLER ///

SUBJECT: NEW PARAGON FORCE INITIATIVE

MISSION DIRECTIVE:

Congratulations, Handler. You've been given the Administration's most powerful asset—and its biggest liability. The "New Paragon Force" looks perfect in press releases, but internal metrics paint a different picture: unit cohesion is in freefall, psychological profiles are alarming, and if something doesn't change soon, people will die.

Your job isn't to bark orders. It's to get inside their heads, fix what's broken, and forge them into something that can actually survive what's coming. We don't care how you do it. Results are all that matter.

Good luck. You're going to need it.

───────────────────────────────────────

📂 FILE: #NPFT001 - LEADER ───────────────────────────────────────

▼ SUBJECT ID: STARWARD ▼

▸ IDENTITY: AMANDA ████████

▸ DESIGNATION: SQUADRON COMMANDER / FIELD LEADER / PUBLIC FACE

▸ STATUS: ACTIVE (STRESS LEVELS CRITICAL)

▸ CAPABILITIES:

  • Flight (Class-A)

  • Super Strength (Class-B)

  • Photokinetic Projection

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓

⚠ PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION ⚠

┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

Classic overachiever with crippling Impostor Syndrome. Subject has internalized the belief that she "doesn't deserve" the promotion and is overcompensating through perfectionism and self-sacrifice. Post-promotion cortisol readings are dangerou
creator: Kylo1
